creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I commited the fixes despite the mild protests. The instructions 
assumed certain knowledge of the xset before. Perhaps, I'll modify 
them later. As far as parallel building -- it should be done with 
greater support from <bsd.ports.mk>. I guess, a port should just 
be able to declare itself NON_PARALLEL, in which case bsd.ports.mk 
will NOT add `-j <#ofcpus+1>' to the MAKEFLAGS. Until then -- 
everyone is on its own :)
